title: DeepSeek-V4
description: A technical report that bundles DeepSeek-V4 architecture, long-context attention, post-training methods, and serving systems into one connected release.
openingSummary: DeepSeek-V4 matters because it shows how one report can combine new V4-specific modules with older techniques it deliberately reuses. That makes it a good map for separating what this release introduced from what it built on.

whatThePaperIntroduced.title: What The Paper Introduced
whatThePaperIntroduced.body: The report introduces the DeepSeek-V4-Pro and DeepSeek-V4-Flash models, manifold-constrained hyper-connections inside the backbone, compressed sparse attention and heavily compressed attention for million-token context, DeepSeekMoE routing changes, and two important serving systems: on-disk KV cache and expert-parallel overlap. It also documents how the release uses earlier ideas such as on-policy distillation and multi-head latent attention instead of claiming they first appeared here.

whyItMatters.title: Why It Matters
whyItMatters.body: Many papers improve only one layer of the stack. DeepSeek-V4 is more useful as a reference because it shows how model architecture, post-training, quantization, and serving choices can be designed together.

methodOrArchitecture.title: Method Or Architecture
methodOrArchitecture.body: At a high level, the architecture keeps a transformer-style backbone but changes how layers share state and how long context is handled. The V4-specific layer includes manifold-constrained hyper-connections plus the compressed sparse attention (CSA) and heavily compressed attention (HCA) long-context variants, while the broader stack still builds on earlier work such as multi-head latent attention from DeepSeek-V2 and the 2024 on-policy distillation lineage.

evidence.title: Evidence
evidence.body: The paper mixes architecture explanation with deployment evidence. For this site, the important part is not leaderboard ranking. It is the evidence that the proposed modules and systems work together under long-context and low-precision constraints.

limitations.title: Limitations
limitations.body: The paper is broad, which means some components are described at a systems level rather than with one clean ablation each. Readers should treat several claims as stack-level evidence, not as perfect proof that one isolated mechanism is always the cause.

whatItConnectsTo.title: What It Connects To
whatItConnectsTo.body: This expandable list comes directly from paper metadata rather than inferred similarity. It separates the records the report actually introduces from the older ideas and pages it references or uses.

contributionGraph.alt: A contribution map that splits DeepSeek-V4 into architecture, training, and serving branches.
contributionGraph.caption: The report is easiest to decompose as three connected branches: architecture, post-training, and serving.
